allowed_use_cases: draft summarization for management review artifacts

human_approval_status.note: Approved only for limited scope with strict guardrails.

management_review_status.note: GO for limited activation review path only.

autonomous_continuation_note: Autonomous continuation remains not approved unless explicitly approved through the required governance process.
retained_constraints: latest-alias outputs remain advisory-only for risky work
external sends and production-impacting actions remain separately approval-gated
rollback_disable_expectation: If any guardrail fails, disable limited live provider use immediately and route work to REVIEW.
follow_up_actions_before_broader_live_us: Run rollback drills for limited live provider incidents
Document broadened live-use criteria with Management + Audit sign-off
rationale: Limited activation is acceptable only under explicit human checkpoint and retained constraints.
